name: Crystal Nymph
projectTitle: Concrete Batching Plant PM Emissions Reduction Tool
description: This tool models particulate matter (PM2.5/PM10) dispersion from an urban concrete batching plant and compares two engineering control alternatives: enclosed aggregate storage with a fabric filter baghouse (Alt 1) and road/surface stabilization with wet suppression (Alt 2). It helps a user evaluate which intervention better reduces ambient PM concentrations reaching a neighboring residential receptor, and supports a structured multi-criteria decision.
